description.content: Fetch and scrape any URL with anti-bot bypass, proxy rotation, and optional JavaScript rendering. Returns clean HTML, markdown, JSON, raw content, or plain text.

query.description: Enable JavaScript rendering via headless browser
Proxy geographic location using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes. Supports exclusions and weighted distribution.
Page language preference via Accept-Language header
Delay after page load in milliseconds (requires render_js=true)
CSS/XPath selector or XHR pattern to wait for before capturing
Custom JavaScript to execute (base64 encoded, max 16KB)
Capture page or element screenshots (CSS selectors, up to 10)
Page interaction actions as JSON scenario (URL encoded)
Session name to persist cookies and browser fingerprint across requests
Reuse the same proxy IP within a session
AI auto-extraction model for predefined content types
Store results and screenshots for debugging
Comma-separated tags to categorize scrapes in dashboard
Retrieve SSL certificate and TLS information
Webhook name to redirect response to
Return scraped content directly as response body instead of JSON wrapper

header.description: Remaining API credits in your account

response.name: Bad request - missing or invalid parameters
Payment issue - quota or billing problem
Valid parameters but request could not be fulfilled

description.content: Scrape a URL using a POST request with parameters in the request body. Useful for complex configurations or when URL length limits are a concern.
Capture a screenshot of a web page. Supports full-page or element-specific screenshots using CSS selectors.

query.description: What to capture: 'fullpage' for entire page, or a CSS selector for a specific element
Delay in milliseconds after page load before capturing

description.content: The Scrapfly Scrape API enables web scraping at scale with anti-bot bypass, proxy rotation, JavaScript rendering, and AI-powered data extraction. One API key unlocks access to web scraping, screenshot capture, structured data extraction, web crawling, and cloud browser automation.
